mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, u.display_name, c.content, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY c.id ASC
SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, u.display_name, c.content, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (post_id, user_id, content, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{content}, NOW(), NOW())
